files.patch:
@@ -1,18 +1,40 @@
-# Hi there! 👋
+# Hi, I'm Matthias! 👋
 
-Welcome to my profile! It's great to have you here.
-
-I'm Matthias Vallentin, founder and CEO at [Tenzir](https://tenzir.com), where I
-work on data pipelines for security operations.
+I'm Founder & CEO at [Tenzir](https://tenzir.com) where I build agentic data
+pipelines for cyber defenders.
 
 Before that, I completed my PhD in computer science and postdoctoral research at
 the University of California, Berkeley, where I had the good fortune of being
 advised by [Vern Paxson](https://www.icir.org/vern).
 
-## Get in touch
+### Tenzir Projects
+
+- 🛡️ [Tenzir](https://github.com/tenzir/tenzir): data pipeline engine for security teams
+- 🧪 [tenzir-test](https://github.com/tenzir/test): powerful integration test framework
+- 🚀 [tenzir-ship](https://github.com/tenzir/ship): automated release engineering
+- 🛠️ [tenzir-skills](https://github.com/tenzir/skills): agent skills for the Tenzir ecosystem
+
+### Personal Projects
+
+Data fun:
+
+- 📙 [stat-cookbook](https://github.com/mavam/stat-cookbook): probability and statistics cookbook
+- 📗 [abstract-algebra-cheatsheet](https://github.com/mavam/abstract-algebra-cheatsheet): visual summary of key structures in abstract algebra
+- ⏳ [compbench](https://github.com/mavam/compbench): benchmark and visualization of compression algorithms
+
+[Pi](https://pi.dev) extensions:
+
+- 🤖 [pi-agents](https://github.com/mavam/pi-agents): agent orchestration framework for pi
+- 🌈 [pi-banner](https://github.com/mavam/pi-banner): rainbow π ASCII art banner for pi
+- ✨ [pi-fancy-footer](https://github.com/mavam/pi-fancy-footer): compact, two-line fancy status footer
+- 🌍 [pi-web-providers](https://github.com/mavam/pi-web-providers): configurable web provider routing for pi tools
+- 🧳 [pi-mcporter](https://github.com/mavam/pi-mcporter): stable bridge from pi to MCP tools
+- 🚦 [pi-worktrunk](https://github.com/mavam/pi-worktrunk): [Worktrunk](https://worktrunk.dev/) branch markers for pi activity
+- 🖥️ [pi-terminal-theme](https://github.com/mavam/pi-terminal-theme): theme that maps UI colors to ANSI terminal colors
 
-Feel free to reach out via email or
-[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/matthias-vallentin) if you'd like to
-connect.
+Random:
